coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass Type: Printable/Digital Coupon Pass (link delivered by email) Admits up to 5 people at 50% off regular admission. Ages 12 months and under are free. To obtain discounted admission in person at the museum please present either a printed pass or on a handheld device. Visit https://www.nschildrensmuseum.org/visit/buy-tickets/ for more information. PASSES CANNOT BE USED ON SATURDAYS
